title: chore(deps): update dependency inquirer to v4.0.2 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [inquirer](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js) from `v4.0.0` to `v4.0.2`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v4.0.1`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/releases/v4.0.1)

- Update dependency to fix a LGPL license issue.

---

### [`v4.0.2`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/releases/v4.0.2)

Improve Windows rendering to properly match terminal size

---

</details>


<details>
<summary>Commits</summary>

#### v4.0.1
-   [`62a72d4`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/62a72d48f85046c8fbfee361f280a88dea06cf8c) Fix typo (#​612)
-   [`9895054`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/989505471c9cbb907118cf4c36f6ad5ba9b9702b) Bumped version to 4.1.0, bumped external-editor dependency to ^2.1.0 … (#​616)
-   [`00f5050`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/00f5050b5ea2a439f591c84f12fbc89cf067a6e5) 4.0.1
#### v4.0.2
-   [`9135e38`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/9135e38fe67fd1afa0d6efd99f2e8ca788d69c11) Update lint-staged to the latest version 🚀 (#​618)
-   [`5f83804`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/5f838049a634e8a3c0027f779a8ce761364dd2fc) Fix extra newline on windows without decremented width. (#​601)
-   [`a88346c`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/a88346c03af2c0da490a5451c227ea45ad066e17) Use SVG examples
-   [`84cfd77`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/84cfd773bfbca9c6ea0e49e5a20a18022d3f1b93) Bump dependencies
-   [`fb37720`](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/commit/fb3772062200530cb6ea110315d86dea0a49641c) 4.0.2

</details>
